meta_description: Decision-ready summary: Acetyl-L-Carnitine is best framed for neuropathy symptoms; mental fatigue; mitochondrial energy context; safety screen: seizure disorder; warfarin; hypothyroid medication review.
meta_title: Acetyl-L-Carnitine Benefits, Effects & Safety Guide

meta_description: Decision-ready summary: Alpha-GPC is best framed for cognitive performance; memory support; power output support; safety screen: low blood pressure; cholinergic sensitivity; anticholinergic medication conflicts.
meta_title: Alpha-GPC Benefits, Effects & Safety Guide

meta_description: Decision-ready summary: Berberine is best framed for fasting glucose support; insulin resistance context; triglyceride/LDL support; safety screen: pregnancy; breastfeeding; diabetes medications; CYP/P-gp medication review.
meta_title: Berberine Benefits, Effects & Safety Guide

meta_description: BPC-157 is a synthetic 15-amino-acid peptide studied mainly in animal models for gut healing, tendon and ligament repair, and inflammation modulation; human clinical trial data is essentially absent and its FDA compounding status is unresolved pending a July 2026 PCAC review.
meta_title: BPC-157 Benefits, Effects & Safety Guide

meta_description: Decision-ready summary: Caffeine is best framed for alertness; reaction time; fatigue reduction; safety screen: anxiety disorder; uncontrolled hypertension; arrhythmia.
meta_title: Caffeine Benefits, Effects & Safety Guide

meta_description: Decision-ready summary: Citicoline / CDP-choline is best framed for attention support; cognitive recovery; memory support; safety screen: cholinergic sensitivity; anticholinergic medication conflict.
meta_title: Citicoline / CDP-choline Benefits, Effects & Safety Guide

meta_description: CJC-1295 is a synthetic growth hormone releasing hormone (GHRH) analog engineered for a longer half-life than natural GHRH, commonly combined with Ipamorelin in gray-market protocols; its GH/IGF-1 mechanism has early pharmaceutical-development data behind it, but no FDA approval and an uncertain compounding pathway.
meta_title: CJC-1295 Benefits, Effects & Safety Guide

meta_description: Decision-ready summary: Coenzyme Q10 is best framed for statin-associated muscle symptoms; heart failure support; mitochondrial fatigue; safety screen: warfarin or anticoagulant management; planned surgery.
meta_title: Coenzyme Q10 Benefits, Effects & Safety Guide

meta_description: Decision-ready summary: Curcumin + piperine is best framed for osteoarthritis pain; inflammation markers; bioavailability-enhanced curcumin use; safety screen: drug-interaction sensitive medications; anticoagulants; gallbladder disease.
meta_title: Curcumin + piperine Benefits, Effects & Safety Guide

meta_description: Decision-ready summary: EGCG is best framed for fat oxidation support; cardiometabolic markers; antioxidant polyphenol intake; safety screen: liver disease; high-dose fasting use; stimulant sensitivity.
meta_title: EGCG Benefits, Effects & Safety Guide

meta_description: GHK-Cu is a naturally occurring copper-binding tripeptide with a genuinely well-supported topical cosmetic evidence base — including human RCTs for skin firmness, fine lines, and wound healing — plus a separate, much less-evidenced injectable/RUO research-peptide use.
meta_title: GHK-Cu Benefits, Effects & Safety Guide

meta_description: Decision-ready summary: Huperzine A is best framed for memory support; acetylcholinesterase inhibition; safety screen: seizure disorder; cholinergic drugs; bradycardia.
meta_title: Huperzine A Benefits, Effects & Safety Guide

meta_description: Ipamorelin is a selective ghrelin-receptor agonist (growth hormone secretagogue) with more human clinical data than most peptides in this class, showing reliable dose-dependent GH release with minimal cortisol/prolactin cross-reactivity; downstream body-composition and sleep claims are more extrapolated than proven.
meta_title: Ipamorelin Benefits, Effects & Safety Guide

meta_description: Decision-ready summary: L-theanine is best framed for acute relaxation; calm focus; caffeine smoothing; safety screen: low blood pressure; sedative stacking caution.
meta_title: L-theanine Benefits, Effects & Safety Guide

meta_description: Decision-ready summary: L-Tyrosine is best framed for acute stress performance; sleep-deprivation focus; cold/stress resilience; safety screen: MAOIs; hyperthyroidism; levodopa/thyroid medication review.
meta_title: L-Tyrosine Benefits, Effects & Safety Guide

meta_description: Magnesium is most useful when low intake, deficiency risk, muscle tension, or sleep-quality issues overlap.
meta_title: Magnesium Benefits, Effects & Safety Guide

meta_description: Decision-ready summary: NAC is best framed for respiratory mucus support; glutathione replenishment; compulsive-behavior research context; safety screen: nitroglycerin; active ulcer; asthma caution.
meta_title: NAC Benefits, Effects & Safety Guide

meta_description: Decision-ready summary: Omega-3 fatty acids is best framed for triglyceride reduction; cardiovascular support; inflammation modulation; safety screen: bleeding disorder; anticoagulants at high dose; fish allergy.
meta_title: Omega-3 fatty acids Benefits, Effects & Safety Guide

meta_description: Human evidence is insufficient for broad cognition or liver claims as a standalone supplement target.
meta_title: Phosphatidylcholine Benefits, Effects & Safety Guide

meta_description: PT-141 is the research-chemical name for bremelanotide, a melanocortin receptor agonist with an actual FDA-approved product (Vyleesi) for hypoactive sexual desire disorder in premenopausal women; most gray-market marketing (including to men, for erectile dysfunction) extends well beyond that narrow approved indication on much thinner evidence.
meta_title: PT-141 (Bremelanotide) Benefits, Effects & Safety Guide

meta_description: Semaglutide is a GLP-1 receptor agonist, FDA-approved as Ozempic, Wegovy, and Rybelsus, backed by a large multi-trial Phase 3 program spanning weight management, type 2 diabetes, cardiovascular risk reduction, and kidney outcomes — a categorically stronger evidence tier than the RUO peptides elsewhere in this series.
meta_title: Semaglutide Benefits, Effects & Safety Guide

meta_description: TB-500 is a synthetic fragment of thymosin beta-4 marketed for muscle recovery and connective-tissue repair; the underlying Tβ4 biology has real scientific grounding, but the synthetic fragment sold as TB-500 has thin direct human evidence and an unresolved FDA compounding status pending July 2026 PCAC review.
meta_title: TB-500 Benefits, Effects & Safety Guide

meta_description: Tirzepatide is a dual GIP/GLP-1 receptor agonist, FDA-approved as Mounjaro and Zepbound, showing the largest average weight-loss effect of any approved obesity drug to date (up to ~22.5% body weight at 72 weeks in SURMOUNT-1) and superior HbA1c reduction versus semaglutide in a head-to-head trial.
meta_title: Tirzepatide Benefits, Effects & Safety Guide
